commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Google Chat auth, webhook parsing, access policy, delivery, dedupe, ADDED_TO_SPACE handling, and the Google Chat reply-to default.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the PR review blockers. Comparing PR head with current main shows the auth binding removal, sender-policy downgrade, broad BOT mention match, raw payload logging, unsafe dedupe, and ADDED_TO_SPACE lifecycle gap; I did not run live Google Chat traffic in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof, changes security-sensitive auth/access paths, is conflicting, and includes a reply-default product decision; automation should not repair or merge this broad branch without maintainer direction.
